display_name: UCC passkey-auth — audit-log persistence (Redis primary store)

research.note: Research inherited from parent ucc-passkey-auth feature.

prd.note: PRD inherited from parent. Architectural decision (Redis vs new endpoint) captured in §Problem below.

tasks.approval_note: User approved 2026-05-17. Security audit surfaced 1 HIGH finding (operator_label PII in public-access blob) → T4 amended to add cron-write sanitize step (hash operator_label to operator_label_hash before blob put). Redis live store keeps raw emails for AuditLogPanel; blob gets only hashes. No other task changes.

t6_resume_plan_2026_05_18.trigger: Natural Vercel cron fires daily at 05:13 UTC; GHA ucc-audit-log-sync.yml fires at 05:17 UTC (now wired with UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_URL per T7 close 2026-05-17T14:05:50Z; workflow self-activates when the blob exists).
t6_resume_plan_2026_05_18.operator_action_today: Sign in once at https://fitme-story.vercel.app/control-room/sign-in to populate Redis with 3 audit events (auth_passkey_authenticate_started + auth_passkey_authenticate_succeeded + auth_session_minted).
resume_check_sequence: curl the URL — expect 3+ sanitized JSONL events (operator_label_hash present, operator_label absent)
T7 wire step already done 2026-05-17T14:05:50Z (PR #387); SKIP `gh variable set` step
gh workflow run ucc-audit-log-sync.yml --repo Regevba/FitTracker2 (force re-run now that blob exists)
T8 parts_deferred reconcile already done in PR #387; SKIP
Append §99 sub-entry to case study: 'T6 closed 2026-05-18, B7 fully validated end-to-end, B8 kill-criteria gate ready'
t6_resume_plan_2026_05_18.why_path_b: Vercel Hobby plan lacks 'Run Now' cron trigger (Pro-only). Vercel UI /crons URL 404'd (correct path is /cron-jobs but operator confirmed no Run button visible). Curl-with-CRON_SECRET path declined to keep secret out of conversation transcript. Path B = natural cron + 17h wait, well within B8 deadline (2026-05-23) 5-day buffer.

problem_statement: logAuthEvent at src/lib/auth/audit-log.ts:113-143 does not persist anything in Vercel production. Stage 1 writes cwd/.local/ucc-auth-events.jsonl which is read-only on Vercel function filesystem. Stage 2 fetches UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_ENDPOINT which was never provisioned. The cron /api/cron/sync-audit-log reads the same dead path and returns synced:0 every run. Discovered 2026-05-17 during B7 (wire UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_URL) execution: HEAD probe to wbm976bbad3tvk2o.public.blob.vercel-storage.com/ucc-auth-events.jsonl returned 404, confirming the blob was never written. All audit events since 2026-05-07 shipped silently into the void.
proposed_solution: Replace local-file Stage 1 with Upstash Redis as primary store. Each logAuthEvent call does redis.lpush('ucc:audit-log:events', JSON.stringify(event)) + bounded redis.ltrim to last 10000 events. readAuthEvents reads via lrange. Cron route refactors to read Redis range and write Blob (Redis stays the live source, Blob is the daily FT2-sync target). Uses existing Upstash provisioning (KV_REST_API_*) — no new env vars or infrastructure required.
blocks_followups: B7 — wire UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_URL repo variable (calendar-anchored 2026-05-17, blocked until cron writes blob)
B8 — UCC T+7d kill-criteria checkpoint 2026-05-23 (K1/K2/K3 require audit-log data)
C5 — Part 10 framework-health passkey panel render verification (depends on B7)

tasks.title: Add Redis audit-log primitives in src/lib/auth/redis-audit-log.ts (pushEvent, readEvents, trimEvents)
tasks.note: redis.lpush('ucc:audit-log:events', json) for write, redis.ltrim('ucc:audit-log:events', 0, 9999) for bound, redis.lrange('ucc:audit-log:events', 0, N) for read. Uses existing getRedis() from redis-client.ts. Cap = 10000 events (~5MB at avg 500B/event).

tasks.title: Refactor logAuthEvent to write via Redis primary, drop local-fs Stage 1, keep best-effort blob-endpoint Stage 2
tasks.note: Drop the fs.appendFile path entirely (it silently fails on Vercel). Stage 1 becomes redis.lpush. Stage 2 (UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_ENDPOINT) stays as optional escape hatch for external log forwarders.

tasks.title: Refactor readAuthEvents to read from Redis range
tasks.expanded_scope_note: T3 originally scoped to readAuthEvents only. During integration trace surfaced load-events.ts::loadAuthEvents as the actually-used UI reader (AuditLogPanel + audit page). Refactored both — single-PR scope.
tasks.note: AuditLogPanel consumes this. Default range = last 50 events (panel's UI limit).

tasks.title: Refactor /api/cron/sync-audit-log to read Redis, sanitize PII (hash operator_label), write Blob
tasks.note: Read all events via lrange 0..-1. SANITIZE each event: drop operator_label, add operator_label_hash via sha256Truncated(operator_label, 12) — same convention as credential_id_hash. Write sanitized JSONL to Blob with addRandomSuffix:false + access:public + allowOverwrite:true (deterministic URL, PII-free contents). Do NOT trim Redis. Security amendment per 2026-05-17 pre-implementation audit: blob is publicly readable so operator emails must never leave Redis.

tasks.title: Update unit tests (audit-log.test.ts + load-events.test.ts) for Redis-backed flow with mock Redis
tasks.note: Cover: write→read round-trip, ltrim enforcement at cap, redactInput still applied, server-side safety (no fs leak).

tasks.title: Deploy + manually invoke cron via curl to validate blob lands at deterministic URL
tasks.note: After PR merges to fitme-story main + Vercel auto-deploy READY: curl GET https://fitme-story.vercel.app/api/cron/sync-audit-log -H 'Authorization: Bearer $CRON_SECRET'. Expect response {ok:true, synced:N>=2, url:'https://...'}. HEAD the URL — expect 200.

tasks.title: Wire UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_URL repo variable in FT2 via gh CLI (B7 unblock)
tasks.completed_note: Wired preemptively ahead of T6 because the blob URL is deterministic from the Vercel Blob store ID (store_Wbm976bbAd3TvK2o → https://wbm976bbad3tvk2o.public.blob.vercel-storage.com/ucc-auth-events.jsonl). The FT2 ucc-audit-log-sync.yml workflow short-circuits cleanly on 404, so setting the variable now is safe; it auto-activates the moment the next Vercel Cron (05:13 UTC) populates the blob. The workflow_dispatch verification still waits on T6 (cron must produce a real blob first).
tasks.note: gh variable set UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_URL --body '<url-from-T6>' --repo Regevba/FitTracker2. Trigger ucc-audit-log-sync.yml via workflow_dispatch to verify FT2 syncs the blob to .claude/logs/ucc-auth-events.jsonl.

tasks.title: Update parent ucc-passkey-auth state.json rollout_status — flip Part 9 from deferred to shipped
Append §99 to ucc-passkey-auth case study — document the audit-log persistence bug + Redis-backed fix
tasks.note: Honest disclosure: feature shipped 2026-05-07 with broken persistence; bug discovered 2026-05-17 during B7 wiring; fix lands as in-band enhancement. Frame as v7.8.5 W-pattern (filesystem-ephemerality on Vercel serverless).

factors_applied.reason: Upstash Redis already provisioned; no new env vars or services
Code in fitme-story, state.json + GH variable in FT2

transitions.note: 9-task plan approved. Pre-implementation security audit surfaced operator_label PII vector in public blob — T4 amended to hash operator_label at cron-sanitize boundary. Integrity check clean (0 findings + 3 unrelated advisories).
